forceRule: Harlow First Reaction Force Units gain +2 Movement when Sprinting.

battleDrills.name: Assaulters
battleDrills.description: Models in this Unit cannot be Targeted by Overwatch when Repositioning.

battleDrills.name: Chaff
battleDrills.description: Place a Smoke Token (Chaff) within 6" of a Model in this Unit before Activating. Chaff Smoke Tokens Dissipate on a 10+.

battleDrills.name: Stims
battleDrills.description: Models in this Unit gain +2 Movement for their Activation.

forceRule: All UN Raid Team Alpha UTG Assaulter and Specialist Units gain an additional D10 roll in all Skill Checks, including Shooting and Close Quarters Combat (CQC).

battleDrills.name: Close Assault
battleDrills.description: Models in this Unit may Move 2" after their Activation ends, only if it would bring them into CQC with an Enemy Model.

battleDrills.name: Cross Fire
battleDrills.description: If more than one Model in this Unit Targets the same Enemy Model, their Weapons gain +1 Damage.

battleDrills.name: Switchback
battleDrills.description: Place a Smoke Token within 4" of a Model in this Unit before Activating. All Models may be Moved up to 2" before Activating.

forceRule: All UN 3rd Battalion non-AI Infantry Models that are Base-to-Base with another Infantry Model may re-roll all Failed Shots with non-Armory weapons.

battleDrills.name: Arsenal
battleDrills.description: This Unit may use one Armory Item without marking a Combat Load during this Activation.

battleDrills.name: Peel Back
battleDrills.description: Infantry Models in this Unit may be moved up to 2" at the end of the unit's activation.

battleDrills.name: Switchback
battleDrills.description: Place a Smoke Token within 4" of a Model in this Unit before Activating. All Models may be Moved up to 2" before Activating.

forceRule: Manticor Borz Group Models ignore the first point of Damage suffered from a Blast Weapon.

battleDrills.name: Linked
battleDrills.description: When a Model in this Unit makes the Ready Action, one Model in the Unit that has already made an Action may gain a Ready Token instead of the Model making the Action.

battleDrills.name: Targeting Smoke
battleDrills.description: Place a Smoke Token within 6" of any Model in this Unit. This Unit will ignore the effects of the Smoke Token during their Activation. Enemy Units will treat the Smoke Token as normal.

battleDrills.name: Thorax Shields
battleDrills.description: Models in this Unit gain +1D10 for Armor Checks during this Activation.

forceRule: Once Per Round one non-AI or Powered Infantry Model may make the Data Attack Action.

battleDrills.name: Overwhelming Fire
battleDrills.description: Return Fire Reactions that Target Models in this Unit with the Cyclic Special Rule may never roll more than 1D10.

battleDrills.name: Small Unit Tactics
battleDrills.description: Up to half of the Models (rounding up) in the Unit may make the Shoot Action during the Reposition step of their Activation. This will cost them their Action during their Activation. Afterward, the remaining Models in the Unit may Reposition and then make an Action.

battleDrills.name: Tactical Positioning
battleDrills.description: During this Activation, Overwatch Targeting Models in this Unit suffers -1D10.

armory.name: Smoke Grenade
armory.ability: Place a Smoke Token within 4" of a Grunt Model in this Unit before Repositioning.
